name: x-search
description: Search X posts and threads from Codex through xAI's built-in x_search Responses tool.

interface.shortDescription: Search X posts and threads with xAI citations
interface.longDescription: X Search adds a local MCP tool for Codex that calls xAI's built-in x_search Responses tool. It supports handle filters, date ranges, image and video understanding flags, API-key auth, Hermes xAI OAuth reuse, citations, retries, and degraded-result detection.
defaultPrompt: Search X for reactions to a launch
Summarize an X thread with citations
